config.lambda_rule: per-arm lambda maximizing mean control-cell (sigma=0) PSNR over the shared grid; frozen before any drift cell; A3 grid mapped through analytic curvature scale H_SCALE.

gate.method: CPL-GI exact conditional binomial MLE + TV
gate.kill_bar: median dQ(CPL vs best[A1,A2]) >= 1.0 dB AND >=5/6 scenes positive; no-harm sigma=0 median >= -0.25 dB
